title: Velocity of a Rock After Deer Scatter
body: Three 70-kg deer are standing on a flat 200-kg rock that is on an ice-covered pond. A gunshot goes off and the deer scatter, with deer A running at $$15\hat{i}+5.0\hat{j}$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$, deer B running at $$-12\hat{i}+8.0\hat{j}$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$, and deer C running at $$1.2\hat{i}-18.0\hat{j}$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$.
